diagrams.name: cli_detect_antipatterns
diagrams.title: CLI: Detect Anti-Patterns
diagrams.description: Developer scans files, directories, or URLs for UI anti-patterns using the detect command
diagrams.scope: CLI detect command and core detection engine

diagrams.name: cli_live_mode
diagrams.title: CLI: Live Browser Detection Mode
diagrams.description: Developer starts/stops a live overlay server that detects anti-patterns in real time in the browser
diagrams.scope: CLI live command and real-time overlay server

diagrams.name: cli_skills_management
diagrams.title: CLI: Skills Management
diagrams.description: Developer lists, installs, updates, and checks skills via the skills subcommand
diagrams.scope: CLI skills subcommand: help, install, update, check

diagrams.name: web_app_core_navigation
diagrams.title: Web App: Core Site Navigation
diagrams.description: Web visitor navigates the main website pages: homepage, cheatsheet, gallery, privacy
diagrams.scope: Top-level static pages served by the Bun web server

diagrams.name: web_app_skills_catalog
diagrams.title: Web App: Skills Catalog
diagrams.description: Web visitor browses the skills index and views individual skill detail pages
diagrams.scope: Skills listing and individual skill pages

diagrams.name: web_app_antipatterns_catalog
diagrams.title: Web App: Anti-Patterns Catalog
diagrams.description: Web visitor browses the catalog of UI anti-patterns with descriptions and examples
diagrams.scope: Anti-patterns catalog page and pattern data

diagrams.name: web_app_tutorials
diagrams.title: Web App: Tutorials
diagrams.description: Web visitor views tutorial index and reads individual tutorial articles
diagrams.scope: Tutorials index and per-tutorial detail pages

diagrams.name: web_app_demo_commands
diagrams.title: Web App: Command Demos
diagrams.description: Web visitor interacts with live demos of Impeccable commands (normalize, layout, colorize, audit, etc.)
diagrams.scope: Interactive command demos in the public web app

diagrams.name: web_app_demo_skills
diagrams.title: Web App: Skill Demos
diagrams.description: Web visitor views interactive skill demos: responsive design, typography, motion design, color & contrast, etc.
diagrams.scope: Interactive skill demos in the public web app

diagrams.name: browser_extension_popup
diagrams.title: Browser Extension: Popup Scan & Overlay Controls
diagrams.description: Extension user triggers a page scan and toggles anti-pattern overlays via the popup UI
diagrams.scope: Browser extension popup: scan, findings count, toggle overlays

diagrams.name: browser_extension_devtools
diagrams.title: Browser Extension: DevTools Panel & Sidebar
diagrams.description: DevTools user inspects per-element anti-pattern findings and manages rules in the DevTools panel and sidebar
diagrams.scope: Chrome DevTools integration: panel, sidebar, and settings

diagrams.name: server_api_downloads
diagrams.title: Server API: File & Bundle Downloads
diagrams.description: User downloads individual skill/config files or full bundles for a chosen provider via the REST API

diagrams.name: build_pipeline_site
diagrams.title: Build Pipeline: Website Generation
diagrams.description: CI/Build system compiles the full website: sub-pages, OG images, promo tiles, browser detector, and static assets
diagrams.scope: Full site build pipeline from source to output

diagrams.name: build_pipeline_extension
diagrams.title: Build Pipeline: Browser Extension Packaging
diagrams.description: CI/Build system bundles, packages, and generates assets for the browser extension
diagrams.scope: Extension build: icon generation, bundling, and zip packaging
